head.hi: The Italian Chargé (Diana) to the Secretary of State

div.p: The Chargé d’Affaires of Italy presents his compliments to His Excellency the Secretary of State and has the honor, by order of his Government, to inform the Department of State that, in conformity with the deliberation of December 5, 1932, by the Grand Council of Fascism, the Italian Ministry of Finance has remitted to-day to the United States Treasury the sum of $1,245.437 (one million, two hundred forty five thousand, four hundred thirty seven dollars) being the amount of the quota of the Italian war debt towards the United States, due December 15, 1932.
